title: Alcoholics Anonymous (2nd Edition)
description: The 1955 second edition of Alcoholics Anonymous. Public domain in the United States — copyright lapsed 1983 (not renewed).

title: Twelve Steps and Twelve Traditions
description: Bill W.'s 1953 essays expanding on the Twelve Steps and Twelve Traditions. Copyright status pending verification — showing short excerpts only.

title: The Twelve Traditions
description: The Twelve Traditions of Alcoholics Anonymous as adopted in 1950. Likely public domain (same vintage as 1st-edition Big Book).

title: Daily Reflections
description: Daily Reflections: A Book of Reflections by A.A. Members for A.A. Members. © Alcoholics Anonymous World Services, Inc. Concordance-only excerpts.
